name: Making the Corporate Platform Decision (ITT Hartford)
description: Aberdeen Group consulting presentation for ITT Hartford on corporate platform decision-making. Background is 1994 Commercial Lines Coop review. Covers desktop OS selection (Windows 95 vs OS/2 Warp vs NT Workstation), workgroup OS strategy (Windows NT/AS and Novell NetWare), platform management, network management, groupware, electronic mail, and distributed software management. 9-slide deck.
